pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which explicitly copies the dataset to this path.

Verified by downloading the Big Five Personality Traits.csv dataset from the official JASP repository and extracting the column headers.
This minimum size threshold is a descriptive claim not explicitly enforced by the verifier.py logic.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real NEO personality research data downloaded from the official JASP GitHub repository. The dataset natively contains the required 5 personality trait columns (Neuroticism, Extraversion, Openness, Agreeableness, Conscientiousness). The expected JASP project archive and the text report paths have been validated against the export scripts and the verifier logic.
